entry.title: UBCIT eSAM Servers Maintenance May 27, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 20:00 - 23:00 PDT

May 5, 12:12 PDT
Scheduled - UBCIT will be performing maintenance on the eSAM component and vault servers on May 27, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT. This change will affect both UBC campuses.

Users will intermittently not be able to login to any servers managed by eSAM, nor retrieve any credentials via the eSAM Web UI throughout the maintenance window.

Any connections terminated while a component is being rebooted can be reconnected to the secondary node. All connections will be terminated and users won't be able to reconnect while we patch the vault servers (which typically lasts around 30 minutes) during this window.

entry.title: TouchNet TEST site (uCommerce 9.5) Scheduled Maintenance May 22, 2026 05:00 to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 22, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

Apr 20, 10:17 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Learner Financial Support Management (LFSM) Maintenance May 21, 2026, 14:00-18:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 21, 14:00 - 18:00 PDT

May 13, 10:53 PDT
Scheduled - Learner Financial Support Management (LFSM) applications, including the UBC Bursary (Financial Profile) application and Award Offer Acceptance screen, will be unavailable from 14:00 to 18:00 PT on May 21,2026 due to a planned system maintenance update. Students, Faculty and Staff are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: Online Advising Management System (OAMS) Scheduled Maintenance May 20, 2026, 17:30-22:30 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 20, 17:30 - 22:30 PDT

May 12, 14:15 PDT
Scheduled - The Online Advising Management System (OAMS) will undergo scheduled maintenance to facilitate a database upgrade on May 20, 2026, from 17:30 PT to 22:30 PT.
During this time, the service may be unavailable.

Please contact SIS.Support@ubc.ca for any questions or concerns.

entry.title: UBC Vancouver Campus Network Maintenance May 16, 2026, 07:00-15:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 16, 07:00 - 15:00 PDT

Apr 21, 14:27 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Vancouver campus network will undergo maintenance on May 16, 2026, 07:00-15:00 PT. During the maintenance window, intermittent disruptions to network connectivity may be experienced, including internet, cloud services and remote VPN access.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Quarterly Maintenance and Weekly Service Update May 15, 2026, 21:00 PT to May 16, 2026, 08:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 21:00 PDT  -  May 16, 08:00 PDT

May 14, 15:52 PDT
Update - Update: Add/drop deadline extended to Monday, May 18 at 11:59 pm (PDT) due to system maintenance

As students will be unable to login to Workday during this maintenance window, the deadline for students to add/drop course sections with a May 15 add/drop deadline has been extended until Monday, May 18 at 11:59 pm. Once the system is restored on Saturday, May 16, students will have access to the add/drop functionality for these course sections until the updated deadline above.

Students can confirm course-specific add/drop deadlines in Workday by using the Find Course Sections report, which shows the adjusted deadline for any impacted courses. Student can refer to Viewing the Course Schedule (Okanagan | Vancouver) to learn how to find an add/drop date in the Find Course Sections report.

May 11, 10:53 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on May 15, 2026, 21:00 PT to May 16, 2026, 08:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its quarterly service update. During the scheduled maintenance period, Workday will be unavailable for use.
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: Okanagan Campus Network Maintenance May 15, 2026, 19:00-22:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 19:00 - 22:00 PDT

May 12, 14:23 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance will occur for the Okanagan campus on May 15, 2026, 19:00-22:00 PT. No disruption to network services is expected.

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Friday, May 15, 2026 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 09:00 - 17:00 PDT

May 11, 11:09 PDT
Scheduled - On Friday, May 15, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD Site Maintenance May 15, 2026 00:00 to 04:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 00:00 - 04:00 PDT

Apr 20, 10:14 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: AWS Network Firewall Maintenance, May 14, 2026 19:00-20:00 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 19:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 15:53 PDT
Scheduled - The AWS Network Firewall will be undergoing maintenance on May 14, 2026 from 7-8 PM. A brief disruption to AWS connectivity may occur during this window

entry.title: EduCloud Server Maintenance (UBC Okanagan) May 14, 2026, 15:00-18:00 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 14, 15:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 15:45 PDT
Scheduled - The EduCloud Server environment (https://bcnet.educloud.ubc.ca) for Organizations hosted at UBC Okanagan in Kelowna will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on May 14, 2026, 15:00-18:00 PT.

There are no expected outages to running virtual machines and no impacts to the EduCloud Server Administration Portal.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from May 14, 2026 15:00 -17:00
entry.content:
May 14, 17:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 14, 15:01 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 15:41 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from May 14, 2026 15:00 -17:00 

The EASD Team will be releasing software updates that may affect Scheduling services

During this maintenance window there may be a potential interruption to the apps and services for <30 min (between 3pm to 5pm)
Release activities will be completed between from May 14, 2026  15:00 - 16:00, Validation will continue until 17:00.

Apps/Services:

Bug fixes / Enhancement for Scheduling Activity Transfer

Fix stalled activity transfer in the production environment, due to CRSS not being able to handle Scientia activities that have a blank 'Name' field.

Impacts:

No other impacts to end users.

Reason for maintenance:

IRP Student: Scheduling Activity Transfer bug fixes

entry.title: Canvas May 14, 2026 14:30 to 16:30 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 16:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 14, 15:50 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 14, 15:46 PDT
Scheduled - UBC Canvas would undergo maintenance on May 14, 2026 14:30 to 16:30 PT. Multi-factor authentication (MFA) would be enforced for students logging into Canvas.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery service maintenance for Affiliate Student Management Tool 14 May 2026 08:00 - 16:00 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 16:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 14, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 15:39 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Affiliate Student Management Tool (ASMT) will undergo maintenance from 14 May 2026 from 12:00 - 16:00

Apps/Services:
Bug fixes for Affiliate Student Management Tool (ASMT)

Impacts:
During this maintenance there may be a brief interruption (from 14 May 2026 from 12:00 - 12:30) to the apps and services listed above.

Impacted Services:
ubc-iec--asmt-api--1

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery (EASD) – LFS Services Maintenance from May 14, 2026 15:00 - 16:00
entry.content:
May 14, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 14, 15:01 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 15:36 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery (EASD) – LFS Services Maintenance from May 14, 2026 15:00 - May 14, 2026 16:00

The LFS Team will be releasing software updates that may affect any of the following:

Apps/Services:

Learner Financial System (LFS)
There will be an upcoming outage on May 21 from 2pm-6pm for the LFSM system for the release of new features for our work with Student Aid BC. During this outage, students and staff will be unable to access LFSM.


Release Impact

No other impacts to end users
Release activities will be completed between May 14, 2026 15:00 - May 14, 2026 16:00
Reason for maintenance:

Bug Fixes for Appian LFS

entry.title: you.ubc.ca Website is not accessible May 14, 2026 10.45 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 14:37 PDT
Monitoring - The website has been restored.  UBC IT technicians will continue to monitor through the day.

May 14, 14:37 PDT
Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue.

May 14, 13:02 PDT
Update - Update : May 14, 2026 13:00 PT

Technicians are continuing to work on a resolution. This message will be updated when we have more information.

May 14, 10:47 PDT
Investigating - Presently you.ubc.ca Website is not accessible. Technicians are working to restore the website.

entry.title: University Endpoint Management System (UEMS) Issue May 12, 2026 08.15 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 08:35 PDT
Resolved - 14 May 2026 - 08:30 AM

The service was fully restored last night and is operating as usual this morning.

May 13, 10:42 PDT
Update - 13 May 2026 - 10:45 AM

There is currently a delay in restoring the MECM service. UBC IT, in collaboration with the vendors, continues to actively work on resolving the issue.
Further updates will be shared as more information becomes available.
Thank you for your continued patience.

May 12, 14:07 PDT
Update - 12 May 2026 - 2:00 PM

UBC IT is continuing to work with Microsoft Support to restore the service. We are working around the clock and appreciate your patience.
Further updates will be shared as more information becomes available.

May 12, 13:21 PDT
Update - UBC IT Technicians continue to investigate this issue.

May 12, 08:14 PDT
Investigating - Late afternoon on May 11, an issue was identified affecting the University Endpoint Management System (UEMS). The system is currently undergoing maintenance while investigation and recovery work are in progress.
Impact
• No impact to existing managed windows device operations or day-to-day functionality
• Some services may be temporarily affected during this period

Status
Updates will be shared as more information becomes available and as restoration work progresses.

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

entry.title: Jupyter Open Maintenance May 14, 2026, 06:00-07:00 PT
entry.content:
May 14, 07:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 14, 06:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 17:56 PDT
Scheduled - Jupyter Open will be unavailable due to scheduled maintenance on May 14, 2026 06:00-07:00 PT.

entry.title: Okanagan Campus Network Maintenance May 13, 2026, 21:00 - 22:00 PT
entry.content:
May 13, 22:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 13, 21:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 15:03 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance will occur for the Okanagan campus on May 13, 2026, between 21:00 - 22:00 PT. This maintenance is being performed by our service provider. Some network services and internet will be unavailable for approximately 10 minutes during the change window.

entry.title: Hybrid Cloud Service AWS Network Guardrail Update May 13, 2026 19:00-19:30 PT
entry.content:
May 13, 19:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 13, 19:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 15:47 PDT
Scheduled - An existing network guardrail controlling access to AWS account networking infrastructure will be updated on May 13 2026 19:00 - 19:30 PT to enforce access at the AWS Organization Unit levels

entry.title: Totem Park (Qelexen House) Network Switch Replacement May 13, 2026 08:00 - May 13, 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
May 13, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 13, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 10:57 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Totem Park (Qelexen House) Student Residence, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from May 13, 2026 08:00 - May 13, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

entry.title: Multi-Factor Authentication Maintenance, May 12, 2026, 18:00 - 21:00 PT
entry.content:
May 12, 21:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 12, 18:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 13:52 PDT
Scheduled - MFA systems will be undergoing system maintenance tonight from 18:00 - 21:00 PT.
There will be intermittent downtime of a few minutes up to 30 minutes impacting VPN authentication and MFA Device Management.
Users who experience errors during this window should try again after a few minutes.

entry.title: UBC IT myDNS Service Maintenance May 12, 2026, 17:00-18:00 PT
entry.content:
May 12, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 12, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 15:41 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing maintenance on the myDNS Management Server on May 12, 2026, 17:00-18:00 PT.
DNS/DHCP service will not be impacted but access to the myDNS management interface at https://mydns.ubc.ca will be unavailable for up to 40 minutes while maintenance is being performed.

May 12, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 11, 16:11 PDT
Update - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

May 11, 16:10 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Hem'lesem House Student Residences, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from May 12, 2026 08:00 - May 12, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Cesna'em/Shuswap/Kwakiutl Student Residences, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from May 11, 2026 08:00 - May 11, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.
